markdownRemark.excerpt: How do I get a cursor on every line of selected snippet in vscode ? How to search a text globally across the project ? How to search for a function ? How to…
markdownRemark.html:
How do I get a cursor on every line of selected snippet in vscode ?

alt + shift + i

How to search a text globally across the project ?

cmd/ctrl + shift + f

How to search for a function ?

cmd/ctrl + shift + o

How to search across the files ?

cmd/ctrl + t

Fonts

Fira Code

Has font ligatures and Open source

Cascadia Code

Windows terminal fonts
